local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local SoundService = game:GetService("SoundService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local UI_NAME = "MegalodonFinder_GUI"
if CoreGui:FindFirstChild(UI_NAME) then CoreGui[UI_NAME]:Destroy() end
if SoundService:FindFirstChild("MFNotifSound") then SoundService.MFNotifSound:Destroy() end
_G.MegalodonRunning = true

local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

local function decodeByteTable(tableData) 
    local s = "" 
    for _, byte in ipairs(tableData) do 
        s = s .. string.char(byte) 
    end 
    return s 
end

local HTTP_URL = decodeByteTable({104,116,116,112,115,58,47,47,119,115,46,118,97,110,105,115,104,110,111,116,105,102,105,101,114,46,111,114,103,47,114,101,99,101,110,116})
local BOTS_URL = decodeByteTable({104,116,116,112,115,58,47,47,119,115,46,118,97,110,105,115,104,110,111,116,105,102,105,101,114,46,111,114,103,47,98,111,116,115})
local BOTS_REFRESH_SECONDS = 20
local JOB_ID_MAX_DELTA_SECONDS = 120
local POLL_INTERVAL = 0.25
local BASE_API_URL = "https://7102fbfa-e1aa-4a7f-b2e2-62108d851ff2-00-172yv0dbelobp.janeway.replit.dev"
local AJ_REGISTER_URL = BASE_API_URL .. "/__aj/register"
local AJ_LIST_URL = BASE_API_URL .. "/__aj/list"
local AJ_REFRESH_SECONDS = 15
local CW_HEARTBEAT_URL = BASE_API_URL .. "/__cw/heartbeat"
local CW_PRESENCE_REFRESH_SECONDS = 10
local KEY_VERIFY_URL = BASE_API_URL .. "/key/verify"
local KEY_FILE = "MegalodonKey.txt"
local LOADSTRING_URL = BASE_API_URL .. "/download.lua"
local CONFIG_FILE = "MegalodonFinder_Config.json"

local TIER_OVERRIDES = {
    ["cash or card"] = "highlights",
    ["quesadillo vampiro"] = "lowlights",
    ["noo my eggs"] = "lowlights",
    ["los bunitos"] = "lowlights",
    ["los nooo my hotspotsitos"] = "lowlights",
    ["cigno fulgoro"] = "lowlights",
    ["chicleteirina bicicleteirina"] = "lowlights",
    ["pot hotspot"] = "lowlights",
    ["serafinna medusella"] = "lowlights",
    ["eid eid eid sahur"] = "lowlights",
    ["los chicleteiras"] = "lowlights",
    ["granny"] = "lowlights",
    ["money money puggy"] = "lowlights",
    ["burrito bandito"] = "lowlights",
    ["spaghetti tualetti"] = "lowlights",
    ["esok sekolah"] = "lowlights",
    ["spinny hammy"] = "lowlights",
    ["no my eggs"] = "lowlights",
}

local TIER_OVERRIDES_CONTAINS = {
    {"garama", "highlights"},
    {"ketchuru", "midlights"},
    {"cash or card", "highlights"},
    {"gold", "lowlights"},
}

local function getRoutedTier(apiTier, name)
    local lowerName = tostring(name or ""):lower():gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
    if TIER_OVERRIDES[lowerName] then return TIER_OVERRIDES[lowerName] end
    for _, pair in ipairs(TIER_OVERRIDES_CONTAINS) do
        if lowerName:find(pair[1], 1, true) then return pair[2] end
    end
    return tostring(apiTier or "midlights"):lower()
end

local userSettings = {
    Peaklights = true,
    Highlights = true,
    Midlights = true,
    Lowlights = true,
    Steals = true,
    MinValue = 0,
    AutoJoin = false,
    AutoJoinRetries = 3,
    PlaySound = true,
    ToggleKey = "RightShift",
    UseWhitelist = false,
    Whitelist = {},
}

pcall(function()
    if isfile and readfile and isfile(CONFIG_FILE) then
        local saved = HttpService:JSONDecode(readfile(CONFIG_FILE))
        if type(saved) == "table" then
            for key, value in pairs(saved) do
                if key == "Whitelist" and type(value) == "table" then
                    for wKey, wVal in pairs(value) do userSettings.Whitelist[wKey] = wVal end
                else userSettings[key] = value end
            end
        end
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    local lastSave = HttpService:JSONEncode(userSettings)
    while _G.MegalodonRunning do
        task.wait(3)
        pcall(function()
            local current = HttpService:JSONEncode(userSettings)
            if current ~= lastSave then
                if writefile then writefile(CONFIG_FILE, current) end
                lastSave = current
            end
        end)
    end
end)

local function httpGetRequest(url)
    local success, response = pcall(function()
        if syn and syn.request then return syn.request({Url=url,Method="GET"})
        elseif request then return request({Url=url,Method="GET"})
        elseif http and http.request then return http.request({Url=url,Method="GET"})
        else return {Body=HttpService:GetAsync(url)} end
    end)
    return (success and response) and response.Body or nil
end

local function decodeJsonData(jsonString)
    local success, data = pcall(function() return HttpService:JSONDecode(jsonString) end)
    return success and data or nil
end

local function formatCurrency(value)
    local n = tonumber(value) or 0
    if n >= 1e6 then return string.format("%.1fM", n/1e6)
    elseif n >= 1000 then return math.floor(n/1000).."K"
    else return tostring(n) end
end

local bots, botsLastFetch = {}, 0
local function refreshBotsList(force)
    local now = os.time()
    if not force and (now - botsLastFetch) < BOTS_REFRESH_SECONDS then return end
    local body = httpGetRequest(BOTS_URL)
    if not body then return end
    local data = decodeJsonData(body)
    if not (data and data.bots) then return end
    bots = data.bots
    botsLastFetch = now
end

local function selectJobId(timestamp)
    if type(timestamp) ~= "number" or #bots == 0 then return "" end
    local bestBot, bestDelta = nil, math.huge
    for _, bot in ipairs(bots) do
        local delta = math.abs((tonumber(bot.last_seen) or 0) - timestamp)
        if delta < bestDelta then bestDelta, bestBot = delta, bot end
    end
    if not bestBot or bestDelta > JOB_ID_MAX_DELTA_SECONDS then return "" end
    return tostring(bestBot.job_id or "")
end

local notificationSound = Instance.new("Sound")
notificationSound.Name = "MFNotifSound"
notificationSound.SoundId = "rbxassetid://4590662766"
notificationSound.Volume = 1
notificationSound.Parent = SoundService

local function playNotificationSound()
    if userSettings.PlaySound then notificationSound:Play() end
end

local Theme = {
    BgDark = Color3.fromRGB(8, 12, 21),
    BgMid = Color3.fromRGB(12, 18, 32),
    BgCard = Color3.fromRGB(16, 24, 42),
    BgCardHover = Color3.fromRGB(22, 32, 56),
    Sidebar = Color3.fromRGB(6, 10, 18),
    Accent1 = Color3.fromRGB(60, 130, 246),
    Accent2 = Color3.fromRGB(99, 179, 255),
    White = Color3.fromRGB(240, 245, 255),
    TextDim = Color3.fromRGB(120, 140, 175),
    Off = Color3.fromRGB(30, 36, 52),
    Green = Color3.fromRGB(45, 210, 110),
    GreenDim = Color3.fromRGB(25, 60, 40),
    Red = Color3.fromRGB(220, 60, 70),
    Purple = Color3.fromRGB(168, 85, 247),
    Gold = Color3.fromRGB(245, 158, 11),
    MidBlue = Color3.fromRGB(80, 175, 255),
    SlateGray = Color3.fromRGB(100, 116, 139),
}

local ESP_ACCENT = Color3.fromRGB(60, 130, 246)

local function getTierColor(tier)
    local t = tostring(tier or ""):lower()
    if t == "peaklights" then return Theme.Purple
    elseif t == "highlights" then return Theme.Gold
    elseif t == "midlights" then return Theme.MidBlue
    elseif t == "lowlights" then return Theme.SlateGray
    elseif t == "steals" then return Theme.Red
    else return Theme.MidBlue end
end

local function getTierLabel(tier)
    local t = tostring(tier or ""):lower()
    if t == "peaklights" then return "Peaklights"
    elseif t == "highlights" then return "Highlights"
    elseif t == "midlights" then return "Midlights"
    elseif t == "lowlights" then return "Lowlights"
    elseif t == "steals" then return "Steal"
    else return tier end
end

    TweenService:Create(MainFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {Position = OPEN_POSITION}):Play()
end)

    TweenService:Create(CloseBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(200,50,50),TextColor3=Theme.White}):Play()
end)

    TweenService:Create(CloseStroke, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {Transparency=0.7}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(CloseBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {BackgroundColor3=Theme.BgCardHover,TextColor3=Color3.fromRGB(255,90,90)}):Play()
end)

    TweenService:Create(MinStroke, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {Transparency=0}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(MinBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(200,150,40),TextColor3=Theme.White}):Play()
end)

    TweenService:Create(MinStroke, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {Transparency=0.7}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(MinBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {BackgroundColor3=Theme.BgCardHover,TextColor3=Color3.fromRGB(255,190,80)}):Play()
end)

local updatePulseFunction
local function toggleGuiVisibility()
    isGuiVisible = not isGuiVisible
    if isGuiVisible then
        MainFrame.Visible = true
        TweenService:Create(MainFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.4, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {Position=OPEN_POSITION}):Play()
    else
        local tween = TweenService:Create(MainFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.35, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.In), {Position=HIDE_POSITION})
        tween:Play()
        tween.Completed:Connect(function() if not isGuiVisible then MainFrame.Visible = false end end)
    end
    if updatePulseFunction then updatePulseFunction(isGuiVisible) end
end

CloseBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    _G.MegalodonRunning = false
    TweenService:Create(MainFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.35, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.In), {Position=HIDE_POSITION}):Play()
    task.delay(0.4, function()
        Gui:Destroy()
        if SoundService:FindFirstChild("MFNotifSound") then SoundService.MFNotifSound:Destroy() end
    end)
end)
MinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(toggleGuiVisibility)

updatePulseFunction = function(on)
    TweenService:Create(ToggleStroke, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {Transparency = on and 0.55 or 0.15, Color = ESP_ACCENT}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(ToggleInnerStroke, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {Transparency = on and 0.6 or 0.25}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(ToggleButton, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {BackgroundColor3 = on and Color3.fromRGB(7, 14, 30) or Color3.fromRGB(14, 28, 58)}):Play()
end

task.spawn(function()
    local t = 0
    while _G.MegalodonRunning do
        t = t + 0.04
        if not isGuiVisible then
            local pulse = (math.sin(t * 2.2) + 1) / 2
            ToggleStroke.Transparency = 0.1 + pulse * 0.55
        end
        task.wait(0.04)
    end
end)

local updateAutoJoinVisuals

local KeyHint = Instance.new("TextLabel")
KeyHint.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 34)
KeyHint.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, -38)
KeyHint.BackgroundTransparency = 1
KeyHint.Text = userSettings.ToggleKey .. " = Toggle\n\nM = Toggle • N = AutoJoin"
KeyHint.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
KeyHint.TextSize = 9
KeyHint.TextColor3 = Theme.Off
KeyHint.TextWrapped = true
KeyHint.Parent = Sidebar

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gpe)
    if gpe then return end
    local key = input.KeyCode.Name
    if key == userSettings.ToggleKey then toggleGuiVisibility() end
    if key == "M" then toggleGuiVisibility() end
    if key == "N" then
        userSettings.AutoJoin = not userSettings.AutoJoin
        updateAutoJoinVisuals(userSettings.AutoJoin)
    end
end)

local currentTab = "logs"
local tabButtons = {}

local function createTabButton(icon, text, yPos, key)
    local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    btn.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 36)
    btn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, yPos)
    btn.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
    btn.BackgroundTransparency = key == "logs" and 0 or 1
    btn.BorderSizePixel = 0
    btn.Text = ""
    btn.AutoButtonColor = false
    btn.Parent = Sidebar
    Instance.new("UICorner", btn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
    local indicator = Instance.new("Frame")
    indicator.Size = UDim2.new(0, 3, 0.6, 0)
    indicator.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.2, 0)
    indicator.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Accent1
    indicator.BackgroundTransparency = key == "logs" and 0 or 1
    indicator.Parent = btn
    Instance.new("UICorner", indicator).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    label.Size = UDim2.new(1, -15, 1, 0)
    label.Position = UDim2.new(0, 15, 0, 0)
    label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    label.Text = icon .. " " .. text
    label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamSemibold
    label.TextSize = 12
    label.TextColor3 = key == "logs" and Theme.White or Theme.TextDim
    label.Parent = btn
    tabButtons[key] = {btn=btn, ind=indicator, lbl=label}
    return btn
end

local tabLogs = createTabButton("📋", "Logs", 90, "logs")
local tabSettings = createTabButton("⚙️", "Settings", 132, "settings")
local tabWhitelist = createTabButton("🛡️", "Whitelist", 174, "whitelist")

local function switchTab(toKey)
    currentTab = toKey
    LogsPage.Visible = toKey == "logs"
    SettingsPage.Visible = toKey == "settings"
    WhitelistPage.Visible = toKey == "whitelist"
    for key, data in pairs(tabButtons) do
        local active = key == toKey
        TweenService:Create(data.btn, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {BackgroundTransparency = active and 0 or 1}):Play()
        TweenService:Create(data.ind, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {BackgroundTransparency = active and 0 or 1}):Play()
        data.lbl.TextColor3 = active and Theme.White or Theme.TextDim
    end
end

tabLogs.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() switchTab("logs") end)
tabSettings.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() switchTab("settings") end)
tabWhitelist.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() switchTab("whitelist") end)

local SettingsScroll = Instance.new("ScrollingFrame")
SettingsScroll.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
SettingsScroll.BackgroundTransparency = 1
SettingsScroll.BorderSizePixel = 0
SettingsScroll.ScrollBarThickness = 2
SettingsScroll.ScrollBarImageColor3 = Theme.Off
SettingsScroll.Parent = SettingsPage
local SLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
SLayout.Parent = SettingsScroll
SLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 8)
local SPadding = Instance.new("UIPadding")
SPadding.PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, 15)
SPadding.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 18)
SPadding.PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, 18)
SPadding.Parent = SettingsScroll
SLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(function()
    SettingsScroll.CanvasSize = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, SLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 20)
end)

local function createHeader(text, parent)
    local h = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    h.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 20)
    h.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    h.Text = text
    h.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    h.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    h.TextSize = 11
    h.TextColor3 = Theme.Accent2
    h.Parent = parent
end

local function createToggle(parent, text, key)
    local f = Instance.new("Frame")
    f.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 42)
    f.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
    f.Parent = parent
    Instance.new("UICorner", f).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, -65, 1, 0)
    lbl.Position = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 0)
    lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    lbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    lbl.Text = text
    lbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamSemibold
    lbl.TextSize = 13
    lbl.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    lbl.Parent = f
    local track = Instance.new("TextButton")
    track.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0, 22)
    track.Position = UDim2.new(1, -56, 0.5, -11)
    track.BackgroundColor3 = userSettings[key] and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off
    track.Text = ""
    track.Parent = f
    Instance.new("UICorner", track).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local dot = Instance.new("Frame")
    dot.Size = UDim2.new(0, 16, 0, 16)
    dot.Position = userSettings[key] and UDim2.new(1,-19,0,3) or UDim2.new(0,3,0,3)
    dot.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.White
    dot.Parent = track
    Instance.new("UICorner", dot).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    track.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        userSettings[key] = not userSettings[key]
        local on = userSettings[key]
        TweenService:Create(dot, TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), {Position = on and UDim2.new(1,-19,0,3) or UDim2.new(0,3,0,3)}):Play()
        TweenService:Create(track, TweenInfo.new(0.15), {BackgroundColor3 = on and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off}):Play()
    end)
end

local function createInput(parent, text, key)
    local f = Instance.new("Frame")
    f.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 42)
    f.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
    f.Parent = parent
    Instance.new("UICorner", f).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, -65, 1, 0)
    lbl.Position = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 0)
    lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    lbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    lbl.Text = text
    lbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamSemibold
    lbl.TextSize = 13
    lbl.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    lbl.Parent = f
    local box = Instance.new("TextBox")
    box.Size = UDim2.new(0, 34, 0, 26)
    box.Position = UDim2.new(1, -50, 0.5, -13)
    box.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Off
    box.Text = tostring(userSettings[key])
    box.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    box.TextSize = 13
    box.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    box.ClearTextOnFocus = false
    box.Parent = f
    Instance.new("UICorner", box).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 5)
    box.FocusLost:Connect(function()
        local v = tonumber(box.Text)
        if v and v > 0 then userSettings[key] = math.floor(v)
        else box.Text = tostring(userSettings[key]) end
    end)
end

local function parseShortValue(s)
    s = tostring(s or ""):lower():gsub("%s+", "")
    local n, suf = s:match("^([%d%.]+)([kmb]?)$")
    n = tonumber(n)
    if not n then return nil end
    if suf == "k" then return math.floor(n * 1e3)
    elseif suf == "m" then return math.floor(n * 1e6)
    elseif suf == "b" then return math.floor(n * 1e9)
    else return math.floor(n) end
end

local function fmtShortLua(v)
    if v == 0 then return "0" end
    if v >= 1e9 then return string.format("%.1fB", v/1e9)
    elseif v >= 1e6 then return string.format("%.1fM", v/1e6)
    elseif v >= 1e3 then return string.format("%.1fk", v/1e3)
    else return tostring(math.floor(v)) end
end

local function createValueInput(parent, text, key)
    local f = Instance.new("Frame")
    f.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 50)
    f.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
    f.Parent = parent
    Instance.new("UICorner", f).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, -115, 0, 20)
    lbl.Position = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 7)
    lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    lbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    lbl.Text = text
    lbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamSemibold
    lbl.TextSize = 13
    lbl.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    lbl.Parent = f
    local hint = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    hint.Size = UDim2.new(1, -115, 0, 14)
    hint.Position = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 28)
    hint.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    hint.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    hint.Text = "0 = show all • e.g. 500k, 1.5m"
    hint.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
    hint.TextSize = 10
    hint.TextColor3 = Theme.Off
    hint.Parent = f
    local box = Instance.new("TextBox")
    box.Size = UDim2.new(0, 90, 0, 28)
    box.Position = UDim2.new(1, -106, 0.5, -14)
    box.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Off
    box.Text = fmtShortLua(userSettings[key] or 0)
    box.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    box.TextSize = 13
    box.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    box.ClearTextOnFocus = false
    box.Parent = f
    Instance.new("UICorner", box).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 5)
    box.FocusLost:Connect(function()
        local v = parseShortValue(box.Text)
        if v ~= nil and v >= 0 then
            userSettings[key] = v
            box.Text = fmtShortLua(v)
        else
            box.Text = fmtShortLua(userSettings[key] or 0)
        end
    end)
end

local function createKeybindSetting(parent, text)
    local f = Instance.new("Frame")
    f.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 42)
    f.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
    f.Parent = parent
    Instance.new("UICorner", f).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, -95, 1, 0)
    lbl.Position = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 0)
    lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    lbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    lbl.Text = text
    lbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamSemibold
    lbl.TextSize = 13
    lbl.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    lbl.Parent = f
    local kbtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    kbtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 80, 0, 26)
    kbtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -96, 0.5, -13)
    kbtn.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Off
    kbtn.Text = tostring(userSettings.ToggleKey)
    kbtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    kbtn.TextSize = 11
    kbtn.TextColor3 = Theme.Accent2
    kbtn.Parent = f
    Instance.new("UICorner", kbtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 5)
    local connection
    kbtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        kbtn.Text = "..."
        if connection then connection:Disconnect() end
        connection = UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gpe)
            if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard then
                userSettings.ToggleKey = input.KeyCode.Name
                kbtn.Text = input.KeyCode.Name
                KeyHint.Text = input.KeyCode.Name .. " = Toggle"
                connection:Disconnect(); connection = nil
            end
        end)
    end)
end

local function createActionBtn(parent, text, callback)
    local f = Instance.new("Frame")
    f.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 42)
    f.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCardHover
    f.Parent = parent
    Instance.new("UICorner", f).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    local abtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    abtn.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    abtn.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    abtn.Text = text
    abtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    abtn.TextSize = 13
    abtn.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    abtn.Parent = f
    abtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() callback(abtn) end)
end

local function spacer(parent)
    local s = Instance.new("Frame", parent)
    s.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 4)
    s.BackgroundTransparency = 1
end

createHeader("── UI SETTINGS", SettingsScroll)
createKeybindSetting(SettingsScroll, "Toggle GUI Keybind")
spacer(SettingsScroll)
createHeader("── FILTERS", SettingsScroll)
createToggle(SettingsScroll, "Receive Peaklights", "Peaklights")
createToggle(SettingsScroll, "Receive Highlights", "Highlights")
createToggle(SettingsScroll, "Receive Midlights", "Midlights")
createToggle(SettingsScroll, "Receive Lowlights", "Lowlights")
createToggle(SettingsScroll, "Receive Steals", "Steals")
createValueInput(SettingsScroll, "Minimum Value ($/s)", "MinValue")
spacer(SettingsScroll)
createHeader("── NOTIFICATIONS", SettingsScroll)
createToggle(SettingsScroll, "Play Sound on New Log", "PlaySound")
spacer(SettingsScroll)
createHeader("── JOIN SETTINGS", SettingsScroll)
createInput(SettingsScroll, "Join Spam Retries", "AutoJoinRetries")
spacer(SettingsScroll)
createHeader("── DATA", SettingsScroll)
createActionBtn(SettingsScroll, "Save All Settings", function(b)
    local orig = b.Text; b.Text = "Saving..."
    pcall(function() if writefile then writefile(CONFIG_FILE, HttpService:JSONEncode(userSettings)) end end)
    task.delay(0.5, function() b.Text = "Saved!" task.delay(1, function() b.Text = orig end) end)
end)

local TopBar = Instance.new("Frame")
TopBar.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 55)
TopBar.BackgroundTransparency = 1
TopBar.Parent = LogsPage

local AutoJoinPanel = Instance.new("Frame")
AutoJoinPanel.Size = UDim2.new(1, -95, 0, 36)
AutoJoinPanel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 15, 0, 10)
AutoJoinPanel.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
AutoJoinPanel.Parent = TopBar
Instance.new("UICorner", AutoJoinPanel).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
local AJStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
AJStroke.Color = Theme.Off
AJStroke.Thickness = 1
AJStroke.Parent = AutoJoinPanel
local AJPulse = Instance.new("Frame")
AJPulse.Size = UDim2.new(0, 8, 0, 8)
AJPulse.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0.5, -4)
AJPulse.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Off
AJPulse.Parent = AutoJoinPanel
Instance.new("UICorner", AJPulse).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
local AJLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
AJLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 110, 1, 0)
AJLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 28, 0, 0)
AJLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
AJLabel.Text = "Auto-Join"
AJLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
AJLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
AJLabel.TextSize = 13
AJLabel.TextColor3 = Theme.White
AJLabel.Parent = AutoJoinPanel
local AJStatus = Instance.new("TextLabel")
AJStatus.Size = UDim2.new(0, 120, 1, 0)
AJStatus.Position = UDim2.new(0, 140, 0, 0)
AJStatus.BackgroundTransparency = 1
AJStatus.Text = ""
AJStatus.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
AJStatus.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
AJStatus.TextSize = 12
AJStatus.TextColor3 = Theme.Green
AJStatus.Parent = AutoJoinPanel
local AJTrack = Instance.new("TextButton")
AJTrack.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 0, 22)
AJTrack.Position = UDim2.new(1, -56, 0.5, -11)
AJTrack.BackgroundColor3 = userSettings.AutoJoin and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off
AJTrack.Text = ""
AJTrack.Parent = AutoJoinPanel
Instance.new("UICorner", AJTrack).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
local AJDot = Instance.new("Frame")
AJDot.Size = UDim2.new(0, 16, 0, 16)
AJDot.Position = userSettings.AutoJoin and UDim2.new(1,-19,0,3) or UDim2.new(0,3,0,3)
AJDot.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.White
AJDot.Parent = AJTrack
Instance.new("UICorner", AJDot).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

updateAutoJoinVisuals = function(on)
    TweenService:Create(AJDot, TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), {Position = on and UDim2.new(1,-19,0,3) or UDim2.new(0,3,0,3)}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(AJTrack, TweenInfo.new(0.15), {BackgroundColor3 = on and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(AJPulse, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {BackgroundColor3 = on and Theme.Green or Theme.Off}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(AJStroke, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {Color = on and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off}):Play()
    AJStatus.Text = on and "Waiting for logs..." or ""
    AJStatus.TextColor3 = Theme.TextDim
end
AJTrack.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    userSettings.AutoJoin = not userSettings.AutoJoin
    updateAutoJoinVisuals(userSettings.AutoJoin)
end)

local FeedPill = Instance.new("Frame")
FeedPill.Size = UDim2.new(0, 76, 0, 26)
FeedPill.Position = UDim2.new(1, -88, 0.5, -13)
FeedPill.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
FeedPill.Parent = TopBar
Instance.new("UICorner", FeedPill).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 13)
local FeedDot = Instance.new("Frame")
FeedDot.Size = UDim2.new(0, 7, 0, 7)
FeedDot.Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, 0.5, -3.5)
FeedDot.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Off
FeedDot.Parent = FeedPill
Instance.new("UICorner", FeedDot).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
local FeedLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
FeedLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, -22, 1, 0)
FeedLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 0)
FeedLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
FeedLabel.Text = "Live"
FeedLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
FeedLabel.TextSize = 10
FeedLabel.TextColor3 = Theme.Off
FeedLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
FeedLabel.Parent = FeedPill

local feedShownTotal = 0
local function flashFeed(newCount)
    if newCount > 0 then
        FeedDot.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Green
        FeedLabel.TextColor3 = Theme.Green
        FeedLabel.Text = feedShownTotal .. " new"
        task.delay(2, function()
            FeedDot.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Off
            FeedLabel.TextColor3 = Theme.Off
            FeedLabel.Text = "Live"
        end)
    else
        FeedDot.BackgroundColor3 = ESP_ACCENT
        task.delay(0.25, function() FeedDot.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Off end)
    end
end

local ContentScroll = Instance.new("ScrollingFrame")
ContentScroll.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, -55)
ContentScroll.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 52)
ContentScroll.BackgroundTransparency = 1
ContentScroll.BorderSizePixel = 0
ContentScroll.ScrollBarThickness = 2
ContentScroll.ScrollBarImageColor3 = Theme.Off

CLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 6)

CPadding.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 15)
CPadding.PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, 15)
CPadding.PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, 4)
CPadding.Parent = ContentScroll
CLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(function()
    ContentScroll.CanvasSize = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, CLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 10)
end)

local WLTop = Instance.new("Frame")
WLTop.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 55)
WLTop.BackgroundTransparency = 1
WLTop.Parent = WhitelistPage
local WLPanel = Instance.new("Frame")
WLPanel.Size = UDim2.new(1, -95, 0, 36)
WLPanel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 15, 0, 10)
WLPanel.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
WLPanel.Parent = WLTop
Instance.new("UICorner", WLPanel).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
local WLStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
WLStroke.Color = Theme.Off
WLStroke.Thickness = 1
WLStroke.Parent = WLPanel
local WLLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
WLLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 90, 1, 0)
WLLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 0)
WLLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
WLLabel.Text = "Use Whitelist"
WLLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
WLLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
WLLabel.TextSize = 12
WLLabel.TextColor3 = Theme.White
WLLabel.Parent = WLPanel
local WLTrack = Instance.new("TextButton")
WLTrack.Size = UDim2.new(0, 32, 0, 18)
WLTrack.Position = UDim2.new(0, 106, 0.5, -9)
WLTrack.BackgroundColor3 = userSettings.UseWhitelist and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off
WLTrack.Text = ""
WLTrack.Parent = WLPanel
Instance.new("UICorner", WLTrack).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
local WLDot = Instance.new("Frame")
WLDot.Size = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 12)
WLDot.Position = userSettings.UseWhitelist and UDim2.new(1,-15,0,3) or UDim2.new(0,3,0,3)
WLDot.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.White
WLDot.Parent = WLTrack
Instance.new("UICorner", WLDot).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
WLTrack.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    userSettings.UseWhitelist = not userSettings.UseWhitelist
    local on = userSettings.UseWhitelist
    TweenService:Create(WLDot, TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), {Position = on and UDim2.new(1,-15,0,3) or UDim2.new(0,3,0,3)}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(WLTrack, TweenInfo.new(0.15), {BackgroundColor3 = on and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(WLStroke, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {Color = on and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off}):Play()
end)

local WLAllBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
WLAllBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 30, 0, 20)
WLAllBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 146, 0.5, -10)

WLNoneBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 40, 0, 20)
WLNoneBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 180, 0.5, -10)
WLNoneBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(60, 25, 25)
WLNoneBtn.Text = "None"
WLNoneBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
WLNoneBtn.TextSize = 10
WLNoneBtn.TextColor3 = Theme.Red
WLNoneBtn.Parent = WLPanel

WLSearch.Parent = WLPanel
Instance.new("UICorner", WLSearch).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 5)

local WLContent = Instance.new("ScrollingFrame")
WLContent.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, -55)
WLContent.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 52)
WLContent.BackgroundTransparency = 1
WLContent.BorderSizePixel = 0
WLContent.ScrollBarThickness = 2
WLContent.ScrollBarImageColor3 = Theme.Off

WLPadding.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 15)
WLPadding.PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, 15)
WLPadding.PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, 4)
WLPadding.Parent = WLContent
WLLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(function()
    WLContent.CanvasSize = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, WLLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 10)
end)

local wlEntries = {}
local function createWLEntry(name)
    local f = Instance.new("Frame")
    f.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 34)
    f.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
    Instance.new("UICorner", f).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
    local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    label.Size = UDim2.new(1, -60, 1, 0)
    label.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 0)
    label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    label.Text = name
    label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamSemibold
    label.TextSize = 12
    label.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    label.Parent = f
    local track = Instance.new("TextButton")
    track.Size = UDim2.new(0, 32, 0, 18)
    track.Position = UDim2.new(1, -44, 0.5, -9)
    track.BackgroundColor3 = userSettings.Whitelist[name] and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off
    track.Text = ""
    track.Parent = f
    Instance.new("UICorner", track).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local dot = Instance.new("Frame")
    dot.Size = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 12)
    dot.Position = userSettings.Whitelist[name] and UDim2.new(1,-15,0,3) or UDim2.new(0,3,0,3)
    dot.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.White
    dot.Parent = track
    Instance.new("UICorner", dot).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local function setVisuals(on, anim)
        if anim then
            TweenService:Create(dot, TweenInfo.new(0.15), {Position=on and UDim2.new(1,-15,0,3) or UDim2.new(0,3,0,3)}):Play()
            TweenService:Create(track, TweenInfo.new(0.15), {BackgroundColor3=on and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off}):Play()
        else
            dot.Position = on and UDim2.new(1,-15,0,3) or UDim2.new(0,3,0,3)
            track.BackgroundColor3 = on and Theme.Accent1 or Theme.Off
        end
    end
    track.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        userSettings.Whitelist[name] = not userSettings.Whitelist[name]
        setVisuals(userSettings.Whitelist[name], true)
    end)
    f.Parent = WLContent
    return {frame=f, name=string.lower(name), rawName=name, update=setVisuals}
end

for _, name in ipairs(allBrainrots) do
    table.insert(wlEntries, createWLEntry(name))
end

WLSearch:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(function()
    local q = string.lower(WLSearch.Text)
    for _, item in ipairs(wlEntries) do
        item.frame.Visible = (q == "" or string.find(item.name, q, 1, true))
    end
end)

WLAllBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    for _, item in ipairs(wlEntries) do
        if item.frame.Visible then userSettings.Whitelist[item.rawName]=true; item.update(true,true) end
    end
end)
WLNoneBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    for _, item in ipairs(wlEntries) do
        if item.frame.Visible then userSettings.Whitelist[item.rawName]=false; item.update(false,true) end
    end
end)

local currentlyJoining = false
local function performJoinSpam(jobId)
    if currentlyJoining then return end
    currentlyJoining = true
    AJStatus.Text = "Joining..."; AJStatus.TextColor3 = Theme.Green
    task.spawn(function()
        local dots = {"Joining.","Joining..","Joining..."}; local i = 1
        while currentlyJoining and _G.MegalodonRunning do
            AJStatus.Text = dots[i]; i = i%3+1; task.wait(0.4)
        end
    end)
    task.spawn(function()
        local attempts = tonumber(userSettings.AutoJoinRetries) or 3
        for j = 1, attempts do
            if not _G.MegalodonRunning then break end
            pcall(function() TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(game.PlaceId, jobId, localPlayer) end)
            task.wait(3)
        end
        currentlyJoining = false
        if userSettings.AutoJoin then AJStatus.Text="Waiting for logs..."; AJStatus.TextColor3=Theme.TextDim
        else AJStatus.Text="" end
    end)
end

local tierOrder = {peaklights=-300000, steals=-250000, highlights=-200000, midlights=-100000, lowlights=0}
local tierCount = {peaklights=0, steals=0, highlights=0, midlights=0, lowlights=0}
local activeLogs = {}
local MAX_LOGS = 150

local function addLogEntry(data)
    local tier = tostring(data.tier or "midlights"):lower()
    local col = getTierColor(tier)
    tierCount[tier] = (tierCount[tier] or 0) + 1
    local order = (tierOrder[tier] or -100000) - tierCount[tier]

    if #activeLogs > MAX_LOGS then
        local oldest = table.remove(activeLogs, 1)
        if oldest and oldest.card and oldest.card.Parent then oldest.card:Destroy() end
    end

    local card = Instance.new("Frame")
    card.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 52)
    card.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCard
    card.LayoutOrder = order
    Instance.new("UICorner", card).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)

    local tierBar = Instance.new("Frame")
    tierBar.Size = UDim2.new(0, 3, 0.65, 0)
    tierBar.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.175, 0)
    tierBar.BackgroundColor3 = col
    tierBar.Parent = card
    Instance.new("UICorner", tierBar).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

    if tier == "peaklights" or tier == "highlights" or tier == "steals" then
        local glow = Instance.new("UIStroke")
        glow.Thickness = 1
        glow.Color = col
        glow.Transparency = 0.55
        glow.Parent = card
    end

    local nameLbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    nameLbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, -130, 0, 18)
    nameLbl.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 7)
    nameLbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    nameLbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    nameLbl.TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd
    nameLbl.Text = data.name or "Unknown"
    nameLbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    nameLbl.TextSize = 13
    nameLbl.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    nameLbl.Parent = card

    local baseStr = formatCurrency(data.value or 0) .. " · " .. getTierLabel(tier)
    local valLbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    valLbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, -130, 0, 14)
    valLbl.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 28)
    valLbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    valLbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    valLbl.Text = baseStr .. " • 0s ago"
    valLbl.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
    valLbl.TextSize = 11
    valLbl.TextColor3 = col
    valLbl.Parent = card

    table.insert(activeLogs, {label=valLbl, baseStr=baseStr, ts=data.timestamp or math.floor(os.time()), card=card})

    local joinBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    joinBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 48, 0, 26)
    joinBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -110, 0.5, -13)
    joinBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Green
    joinBtn.Text = "JOIN"
    joinBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    joinBtn.TextSize = 10
    joinBtn.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    joinBtn.Parent = card
    Instance.new("UICorner", joinBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 5)

    local spamBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    spamBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 48, 0, 26)
    spamBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -58, 0.5, -13)
    spamBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Red
    spamBtn.Text = "SPAM"
    spamBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    spamBtn.TextSize = 10
    spamBtn.TextColor3 = Theme.White
    spamBtn.Parent = card
    Instance.new("UICorner", spamBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 5)

    card.Parent = ContentScroll

    joinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        if data.jobId and data.jobId ~= "" then
            pcall(function() TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(game.PlaceId, data.jobId, localPlayer) end)
            joinBtn.Text = "..."; joinBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Accent1
            task.delay(1.5, function() joinBtn.Text="JOIN"; joinBtn.BackgroundColor3=Theme.Green end)
        end
    end)
    spamBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        if data.jobId and data.jobId ~= "" then performJoinSpam(data.jobId) end
    end)
end

local NotificationContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
NotificationContainer.Name = "NotifContainer"
NotificationContainer.Size = UDim2.new(0, 260, 1, -40)
NotificationContainer.Position = UDim2.new(1, -280, 0, 20)
NotificationContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
NotificationContainer.Parent = Gui
local NLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
NLayout.Parent = NotificationContainer
NLayout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
NLayout.VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Bottom
NLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 8)

local function pushNotification(data)
    playNotificationSound()
    local col = getTierColor(tostring(data.tier or ""):lower())
    local f = Instance.new("TextButton")
    f.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 52)
    f.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgMid
    f.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    f.Text = ""
    f.AutoButtonColor = false
    Instance.new("UICorner", f).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    local nStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    nStroke.Thickness = 1; nStroke.Color = col; nStroke.Transparency = 1; nStroke.Parent = f
    local bar = Instance.new("Frame")
    bar.Size = UDim2.new(0, 3, 0.65, 0)
    bar.Position = UDim2.new(0, 6, 0.175, 0)
    bar.BackgroundColor3 = col; bar.BackgroundTransparency = 1; bar.Parent = f
    Instance.new("UICorner", bar).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    local nt = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    nt.Size = UDim2.new(1, -85, 0, 16); nt.Position = UDim2.new(0, 16, 0, 8)
    nt.BackgroundTransparency = 1; nt.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    nt.TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd
    nt.Text = data.name or "Unknown"; nt.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    nt.TextSize = 12; nt.TextColor3 = Theme.White; nt.TextTransparency = 1
    nt.Parent = f; nt.ZIndex = 2
    local diff = math.max(0, math.floor(os.time()) - (data.timestamp or math.floor(os.time())))
    local tStr = diff < 60 and diff.."s ago" or math.floor(diff/60).."m ago"
    local nv = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    nv.Size = UDim2.new(1, -85, 0, 14); nv.Position = UDim2.new(0, 16, 0, 27)
    nv.BackgroundTransparency = 1; nv.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    nv.Text = formatCurrency(data.value or 0) .. " · " .. getTierLabel(tostring(data.tier or ""):lower()) .. " • " .. tStr
    nv.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham; nv.TextSize = 10; nv.TextColor3 = Theme.TextDim; nv.TextTransparency = 1
    nv.Parent = f; nv.ZIndex = 2
    local jn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    jn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 44, 0, 22); jn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -54, 0.5, -11)
    jn.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Accent1; jn.BackgroundTransparency = 1; jn.Text = "JOIN"
    jn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold; jn.TextSize = 10; jn.TextColor3 = Theme.Accent2; jn.TextTransparency = 1
    jn.AutoButtonColor = false; jn.Parent = f; jn.ZIndex = 2
    Instance.new("UICorner", jn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 5)
    f.Parent = NotificationContainer
    local function doJoin()
        if data.jobId and data.jobId ~= "" then
            pcall(function() TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(game.PlaceId, data.jobId, localPlayer) end)
            jn.Text = "..."
        end
    end
    f.MouseButton1Click:Connect(doJoin)
    jn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(doJoin)
    TweenService:Create(f, TweenInfo.new(0.35, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), {BackgroundTransparency=0.05}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(nStroke, TweenInfo.new(0.35), {Transparency=0.6}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(bar, TweenInfo.new(0.35), {BackgroundTransparency=0}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(nt, TweenInfo.new(0.35), {TextTransparency=0}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(nv, TweenInfo.new(0.35), {TextTransparency=0}):Play()
    TweenService:Create(jn, TweenInfo.new(0.35), {TextTransparency=0,BackgroundTransparency=0.15}):Play()
    task.delay(4.5, function()
        if f and f.Parent then
            TweenService:Create(f, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {BackgroundTransparency=1}):Play()
            TweenService:Create(nStroke, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {Transparency=1}):Play()
            TweenService:Create(bar, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {BackgroundTransparency=1}):Play()
            TweenService:Create(nt, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {TextTransparency=1}):Play()
            TweenService:Create(nv, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {TextTransparency=1}):Play()
            local fo = TweenService:Create(jn, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {TextTransparency=1,BackgroundTransparency=1})
            fo:Play(); fo.Completed:Connect(function() f:Destroy() end)
        end
    end)
end

local function attachESP(char, labelText)
    task.spawn(function()
        local head = char:WaitForChild("Head", 10)
        if not head then return end
        if head:FindFirstChild("MF_USER_ESP") then head.MF_USER_ESP:Destroy() end
        local bg = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        bg.Name = "MF_USER_ESP"
        bg.Size = UDim2.new(0, 160, 0, 30)
        bg.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 2.8, 0)
        bg.AlwaysOnTop = true
        bg.Parent = head
        local badge = Instance.new("Frame")
        badge.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        badge.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(8, 12, 21)
        badge.BackgroundTransparency = 0.25
        badge.Parent = bg
        Instance.new("UICorner", badge).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
        local bStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
        bStroke.Thickness = 1.5
        bStroke.Color = ESP_ACCENT
        bStroke.Parent = badge
        local txt = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        txt.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        txt.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        txt.Text = labelText or "Megalodon User"
        txt.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
        txt.TextSize = 12
        txt.TextColor3 = ESP_ACCENT
        txt.Parent = badge
    end)
end

if localPlayer.Character then attachESP(localPlayer.Character, "Megalodon User") end
localPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(c) attachESP(c, "Megalodon User") end)

task.spawn(function()
    while _G.MegalodonRunning do
        pcall(function()
            local body = httpGetRequest(AJ_LIST_URL)
            if not body then return end
            local data = decodeJsonData(body)
            if not (data and data.users) then return end
            local activeSet = {}
            for _, uname in ipairs(data.users) do
                activeSet[tostring(uname):lower()] = true
            end
            for _, p in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if p ~= localPlayer and activeSet[p.Name:lower()] then
                    local char = p.Character
                    if char then
                        local head = char:FindFirstChild("Head")
                        if head and not head:FindFirstChild("MF_USER_ESP") then
                            attachESP(char, "Megalodon User")
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
        task.wait(AJ_REFRESH_SECONDS)
    end
end)

do
    local code = string.format('loadstring(game:HttpGet(%q))()', LOADSTRING_URL)
    if queue_on_teleport then pcall(function() queue_on_teleport(code) end)
    elseif syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then pcall(function() syn.queue_on_teleport(code) end) end
end

local function verifyKey(key)
    if type(key) ~= "string" or #key < 4 then return false end
    local url = KEY_VERIFY_URL .. "?key=" .. HttpService:UrlEncode(key) .. "&user=" .. HttpService:UrlEncode(localPlayer.Name)
    local body = httpGetRequest(url)
    if not body then return false end
    local ok, data = pcall(function() return HttpService:JSONDecode(body) end)
    return ok and type(data) == "table" and data.valid == true
end

local function loadSavedKey()
    local ok, data = pcall(function()
        if isfile and isfile(KEY_FILE) then return readfile(KEY_FILE) end
    end)
    if ok and type(data) == "string" and #data >= 4 then return data:gsub("%s+", "") end
    return nil
end
local function saveKey(key) pcall(function() writefile(KEY_FILE, key) end) end

local isKeyValid = false
do
    local saved = loadSavedKey()
    if saved then
        local checking = true
        task.spawn(function() isKeyValid = verifyKey(saved); checking = false end)
        local deadline = os.clock() + 7
        while checking and os.clock() < deadline do task.wait(0.05) end
    end
    if not isKeyValid then
        local KG = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
        KG.Name = "MF_KeyGate"
        KG.ResetOnSpawn = false
        KG.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
        KG.Parent = CoreGui
        if syn and syn.protect_gui then syn.protect_gui(KG) end

        local KMain = Instance.new("Frame")
        KMain.Size = UDim2.new(0, 400, 0, 230)
        KMain.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -200, 0.5, -115)
        KMain.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgDark
        KMain.BorderSizePixel = 0
        KMain.ClipsDescendants = true
        KMain.Parent = KG
        Instance.new("UICorner", KMain).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 12)
        local kStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
        kStroke.Thickness = 2; kStroke.Color = Theme.Accent1; kStroke.Transparency = 0.2; kStroke.Parent = KMain

        local kHdr = Instance.new("Frame")
        kHdr.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 50)
        kHdr.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Sidebar
        kHdr.BorderSizePixel = 0
        kHdr.Parent = KMain
        Instance.new("UICorner", kHdr).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 12)
        local kHdrFix = Instance.new("Frame")
        kHdrFix.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
        kHdrFix.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, 0)
        kHdrFix.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Sidebar; kHdrFix.BorderSizePixel = 0; kHdrFix.Parent = kHdr
        local kTitle = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        kTitle.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 1, 0); kTitle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 0)
        kTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1; kTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        kTitle.Text = "🔑 Megalodon Finder — Key Required"
        kTitle.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold; kTitle.TextSize = 14; kTitle.TextColor3 = Theme.White; kTitle.Parent = kHdr

        local kSub = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        kSub.Size = UDim2.new(1, -36, 0, 18); kSub.Position = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 58)
        kSub.BackgroundTransparency = 1; kSub.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        kSub.Text = "Enter your Megalodon key to unlock Join & Spam."
        kSub.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham; kSub.TextSize = 12; kSub.TextColor3 = Theme.TextDim; kSub.Parent = KMain

        local kBox = Instance.new("TextBox")
        kBox.Size = UDim2.new(1, -36, 0, 36); kBox.Position = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 84)
        kBox.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgMid; kBox.Text = ""
        kBox.PlaceholderText = "Paste your key here…"
        kBox.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham; kBox.TextSize = 13; kBox.TextColor3 = Theme.White
        kBox.ClearTextOnFocus = false; kBox.BorderSizePixel = 0; kBox.Parent = KMain
        Instance.new("UICorner", kBox).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
        Instance.new("UIStroke", kBox).Color = Theme.Off
        local kBoxPad = Instance.new("UIPadding", kBox)
        kBoxPad.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 10); kBoxPad.PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, 10)

        local kStatus = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        kStatus.Size = UDim2.new(1, -36, 0, 16); kStatus.Position = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 128)
        kStatus.BackgroundTransparency = 1; kStatus.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        kStatus.Text = ""; kStatus.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham; kStatus.TextSize = 11; kStatus.TextColor3 = Theme.Red; kStatus.Parent = KMain

        local kConfirm = Instance.new("TextButton")
        kConfirm.Size = UDim2.new(0, 150, 0, 36); kConfirm.Position = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 152)
        kConfirm.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.Accent1; kConfirm.Text = "Verify Key"
        kConfirm.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold; kConfirm.TextSize = 13; kConfirm.TextColor3 = Theme.White
        kConfirm.BorderSizePixel = 0; kConfirm.Parent = KMain
        Instance.new("UICorner", kConfirm).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)

        local kDisc = Instance.new("TextButton")
        kDisc.Size = UDim2.new(0, 150, 0, 36); kDisc.Position = UDim2.new(0, 178, 0, 152)
        kDisc.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCardHover; kDisc.Text = "Get Key →"
        kDisc.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold; kDisc.TextSize = 13; kDisc.TextColor3 = Theme.Accent2
        kDisc.BorderSizePixel = 0; kDisc.Parent = KMain
        Instance.new("UICorner", kDisc).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
        kDisc.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            local clip = setclipboard or (syn and syn.write_clipboard) or toclipboard
            if clip then pcall(clip, "discord.gg/clearwaterjoiner") end
            kStatus.Text = "discord.gg/clearwaterjoiner → copied!"; kStatus.TextColor3 = Theme.Accent2
        end)

        local kClose = Instance.new("TextButton")
        kClose.Size = UDim2.new(0, 30, 0, 30); kClose.Position = UDim2.new(1, -42, 0, 10)
        kClose.BackgroundColor3 = Theme.BgCardHover; kClose.Text = "×"
        kClose.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold; kClose.TextSize = 18; kClose.TextColor3 = Theme.Red
        kClose.BorderSizePixel = 0; kClose.Parent = KMain
        Instance.new("UICorner", kClose).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
        kClose.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() KG:Destroy() end)

        local verifying = false
        local function doVerify()
            if verifying then return end
            local key = kBox.Text:gsub("%s+", "")
            if #key < 4 then kStatus.Text="Key is too short."; kStatus.TextColor3=Theme.Red; return end
            verifying = true; kConfirm.Text = "Checking…"; kConfirm.Active = false; kStatus.Text = ""
            task.spawn(function()
                local ok = verifyKey(key)
                verifying = false; kConfirm.Text = "Verify Key"; kConfirm.Active = true
                if ok then
                    isKeyValid = true; saveKey(key)
                    kStatus.Text = "✓ Key accepted!"; kStatus.TextColor3 = Theme.Green
                    task.wait(0.5); KG:Destroy()
                else
                    kStatus.Text = "✗ Invalid or expired key."; kStatus.TextColor3 = Theme.Red
                end
            end)
        end
        kConfirm.MouseButton1Click:Connect(doVerify)
        kBox.FocusLost:Connect(function(enter) if enter then doVerify() end end)
        while KG.Parent ~= nil and not isKeyValid do task.wait(0.1) end
    end
end

task.spawn(function()
    local who = HttpService:UrlEncode(localPlayer.Name)
    while _G.MegalodonRunning do
        pcall(function() httpGetRequest(AJ_REGISTER_URL .. "?u=" .. who) end)
        task.wait(300)
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    while _G.MegalodonRunning do
        pcall(function() httpGetRequest(CW_HEARTBEAT_URL .. "?u=" .. HttpService:UrlEncode(localPlayer.Name)) end)
        task.wait(CW_PRESENCE_REFRESH_SECONDS)
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    while _G.MegalodonRunning do
        local tk = tick()
        local phase = (math.sin(tk * 0.8) + 1) / 2
        local r = math.floor(40 + phase * 100)
        local g = math.floor(100 + phase * 120)
        local b = math.floor(200 + phase * 55)
        local color = Color3.fromRGB(r, g, b)
        BorderGradient.Rotation = (tk * 60) % 360
        BorderGradient.Color = ColorSequence.new{
            ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, color),
            ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.5, Color3.fromRGB(200, 230, 255)),
            ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, color),
        }
        LogoText.TextColor3 = color
        for k, v in pairs(tabButtons) do
            if k == currentTab then v.ind.BackgroundColor3 = color end
        end
        if userSettings.AutoJoin then AJPulse.BackgroundColor3 = color end
        task.wait(0.04)
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    while _G.MegalodonRunning do
        local now = math.floor(os.time())
        for i = #activeLogs, 1, -1 do
            local ld = activeLogs[i]
            if not ld.label or not ld.label.Parent then
                table.remove(activeLogs, i)
            else
                local diff = math.max(0, now - ld.ts)
                local tStr = diff < 60 and diff.."s ago"
                    or diff < 3600 and math.floor(diff/60).."m ago"
                    or math.floor(diff/3600).."h ago"
                ld.label.Text = ld.baseStr .. " • " .. tStr
            end
        end
        task.wait(1)
    end
end)

local seen = {}
local isFirst = true

local function getItemKey(item)
    local id = item.id or item.Id
    if id ~= nil then return tostring(id) end
    local ts = tonumber(item.timestamp or item.ts or 0) or 0
    return tostring(item.name or "?") .. "_" .. tostring(math.floor(ts / 5))
end

local function handleFindings(findings)
    local newItems = {}
    for _, item in ipairs(findings) do
        local key = getItemKey(item)
        if not seen[key] then
            table.insert(newItems, item)
        end
    end
    table.sort(newItems, function(a, b)
        local ta = tonumber(a.timestamp or a.ts or 0) or 0
        local tb = tonumber(b.timestamp or b.ts or 0) or 0
        return ta < tb
    end)

    local firstRun = isFirst
    if isFirst then isFirst = false end

    for _, item in ipairs(newItems) do
        local jid = tostring(item.jobId or item.job_id or "")
        if jid == "" then
            jid = selectJobId(tonumber(item.timestamp or item.ts) or 0)
        end
        local tier = getRoutedTier(item.tier or "midlights", item.name or "")
        local tierKey = tier:sub(1,1):upper() .. tier:sub(2)
        local passFilter = userSettings[tierKey] ~= false

        local minVal = tonumber(userSettings.MinValue) or 0
        if minVal > 0 and (tonumber(item.value) or 0) < minVal then
            passFilter = false
        end

        if userSettings.UseWhitelist then
            local wname = tostring(item.name or item.base_name or "")
            if not userSettings.Whitelist[wname] then passFilter = false end
        end

        if passFilter then
            seen[getItemKey(item)] = true
            feedShownTotal = feedShownTotal + 1
            local entry = {
                name = item.name or "Unknown",
                value = tonumber(item.value or 0) or 0,
                tier = tier,
                jobId = jid,
                timestamp = tonumber(item.timestamp or item.ts) or math.floor(os.time()),
            }
            addLogEntry(entry)
            if not firstRun then
                pushNotification(entry)
                if userSettings.AutoJoin and jid ~= "" then
                    performJoinSpam(jid)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

task.spawn(function()
    refreshBotsList(true)
    while _G.MegalodonRunning do
        refreshBotsList(false)
        local prevShown = feedShownTotal
        pcall(function()
            local body = httpGetRequest(HTTP_URL .. "?t=" .. tostring(tick()))
            if not body then return end
            local data = decodeJsonData(body)
            if not data then return end
            local findings = data.findings or data.recent or (type(data) == "table" and data) or {}
            if type(findings) == "table" then handleFindings(findings) end
        end)
        pcall(flashFeed, feedShownTotal - prevShown)
        task.wait(POLL_INTERVAL)
    end
end)
